teamObjective.explanation: Because the partner is near finish and all my cards are weak non-trump diamonds, the team goal is best served by leading the lowest card to give partner the cheapest winning opportunity and to retain what little high-low structure my hand has.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2) has only 2 cards left, indicating they are near finishing. With no public plays yet, I cannot know their exact ranks or suits, but a partner in this position likely wants to win a trick cheaply and then play out their final card(s). A low single lead gives them the best chance to do so without forcing them to spend a high card or wild/bomb.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents have 3 cards each and have revealed nothing. They probably hold higher non-trump cards and possibly trumps or bombs. If I lead a high card they can still beat it; if I lead a low card they may also beat it, but a low lead minimizes the information/value I give away and preserves my own progression. They cannot exploit a suit I am not showing strongly because I only have low diamonds.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Because the partner is near finish and all my cards are weak non-trump diamonds, the team goal is best served by leading the lowest card to give partner the cheapest winning opportunity and to retain what little high-low structure my hand has.
